summary: Waste-to-Value (Transmuter) feature testing complete. All 15 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI structure verified - all components present. Minor issue: Rewards list not rendering due to empty complexity_rewards in status state.

ui_bugs.issue: Rewards list shows empty - complexity_rewards from API not being rendered. The space-y-1 container has 0 children despite API returning 16 reward types.

action_items: Investigate why complexity_rewards is not being rendered in RewardsList component - API returns data correctly but UI shows empty list
critical_code_review_comments: Backend transmuter.py is well-structured with proper error handling and validation
Frontend LiquidityTrader.js has all required data-testid attributes for testing
API endpoints follow RESTful conventions and return proper status codes
seed_data_creation: Test user has 514 Dust, 2 Fans from backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Transmuter APIs fully tested and working. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_transmuter.py. Frontend Liquidity Trader page at /liquidity-trader renders correctly. Trade Circle has 'Trader' tab linking to Liquidity Trader. The rewards list rendering issue may be related to React state management - the status object is fetched but complexity_rewards may not be triggering a re-render.

api_verification.GET /api/transmuter/status: PASS - Returns dust_balance, fans_balance, tier, exchange_rate, complexity_rewards
api_verification.POST /api/transmuter/accrue-dust: PASS - Accrues dust with complexity multiplier
api_verification.POST /api/transmuter/trade-dust-to-fans: PASS - Converts dust to fans via Phi Cap exchange
api_verification.POST /api/transmuter/generate-blueprint: PASS - Generates Sacred Blueprint with tier-gated features
api_verification.GET /api/transmuter/history: PASS - Returns transaction log with pagination

frontend_verification.Liquidity Trader page: PASS - Renders with status card, trade panel, blueprint panel, rewards panel
frontend_verification.Trade tab: PASS - Shows dust input, MAX button, conversion preview, execute button
frontend_verification.Blueprint tab: PASS - Shows length/width inputs, trade type buttons, generate button
frontend_verification.Rewards tab: PARTIAL - Panel renders but reward items list is empty
frontend_verification.Trade Circle Trader tab: PASS - Shows 'Open Liquidity Trader' button that navigates correctly
